SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Interface Expr

All Known Implementing Classes:
Expr.AggregateFunctionExpr, Expr.AliasExpr, Expr.BetweenExpr, Expr.BinaryExpr, Expr.CaseExpr, Expr.CastExpr, Expr.ColumnExpr, Expr.GroupingSetExpr, Expr.InListExpr, Expr.IsFalseExpr, Expr.IsNotFalseExpr, Expr.IsNotNullExpr, Expr.IsNotTrueExpr, Expr.IsNotUnknownExpr, Expr.IsNullExpr, Expr.IsTrueExpr, Expr.IsUnknownExpr, Expr.LikeExpr, Expr.LiteralExpr, Expr.NegativeExpr, Expr.NotExpr, Expr.PlaceholderExpr, Expr.ScalarFunctionExpr, Expr.SimilarToExpr, Expr.TryCastExpr, Expr.UnnestExpr, Expr.UnresolvedExpr, Expr.WildcardExpr, Expr.WindowFunctionExpr
public sealed interface Expr permits Expr.AliasExpr, Expr.ColumnExpr, Expr.LiteralExpr, Expr.BinaryExpr, Expr.LikeExpr, Expr.SimilarToExpr, Expr.NotExpr, Expr.IsNotNullExpr, Expr.IsNullExpr, Expr.IsTrueExpr, Expr.IsFalseExpr, Expr.IsUnknownExpr, Expr.IsNotTrueExpr, Expr.IsNotFalseExpr, Expr.IsNotUnknownExpr, Expr.NegativeExpr, Expr.BetweenExpr, Expr.CaseExpr, Expr.CastExpr, Expr.TryCastExpr, Expr.ScalarFunctionExpr, Expr.AggregateFunctionExpr, Expr.WindowFunctionExpr, Expr.InListExpr, Expr.WildcardExpr, Expr.GroupingSetExpr, Expr.PlaceholderExpr, Expr.UnnestExpr, Expr.UnresolvedExpr
A DataFusion logical expression, corresponding to datafusion::logical_expr::Expr.

This sealed interface mirrors DataFusion's Expr enum. Each variant is a record that holds the expression data. Expressions are deserialized from protobuf bytes received from the Rust FFI layer.

Use instanceof pattern matching to inspect expression structure: 

if (expr instanceof Expr.BinaryExpr bin) {
    System.out.println("Left: " + bin.left());
    System.out.println("Op: " + bin.op());
    System.out.println("Right: " + bin.right());
}

Variants that cannot be represented via protobuf (e.g., subquery expressions) are captured by Expr.UnresolvedExpr, which stores the raw proto bytes for lossless round-trip serialization.

See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: Expr

    static final record

    An IS NOT UNKNOWN expression (Expr::IsNotUnknown).

    static final record 
    Expr.IsUnknownExpr
    An IS UNKNOWN expression (Expr::IsUnknown).
    static final record 
    Expr.LikeExpr
    A LIKE expression (Expr::Like).
    static final record 
    Expr.LiteralExpr
    A literal value (Expr::Literal).
    static final record 
    Expr.NegativeExpr
    A negation expression (Expr::Negative).
    static final record 
    Expr.NotExpr
    A NOT expression (Expr::Not).
    static final record 
    Expr.PlaceholderExpr
    A placeholder expression (Expr::Placeholder).
    static final record 
    Expr.ScalarFunctionExpr
    A scalar function call (Expr::ScalarFunction).
    static final record 
    Expr.SimilarToExpr
    A SIMILAR TO expression (Expr::SimilarTo).
    static final record 
    Expr.TryCastExpr
    A TRY_CAST expression (Expr::TryCast).
    static final record 
    Expr.UnnestExpr
    An UNNEST expression (Expr::Unnest).
    static final record 
    Expr.UnresolvedExpr
    A catch-all for expression variants that cannot be fully decoded in Java.
    static final record 
    Expr.WildcardExpr
    A wildcard expression (Expr::Wildcard).
    static final record 
    Expr.WindowFunctionExpr
    A window function call (Expr::WindowFunction).

    sortAsc()
    Sort ascending, nulls last (default).

    sortDesc()
    Sort descending, nulls first (default).
    default Expr
    sub(Expr other)

  • Method Details

    • eq

      default Expr eq(Expr other)
      Equality: this = other. 
      col("status").eq(lit("active"))
      Parameters:
      other - the expression to compare
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: Expr::eq

    • notEq

      default Expr notEq(Expr other)
      Not equal: this != other. 
      col("status").notEq(lit("deleted"))
      Parameters:
      other - the expression to compare
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: Expr::not_eq

      default Expr lt(Expr other)
      Less than: this < other. 
      col("age").lt(lit(18))
      Parameters:
      other - the expression to compare
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: Expr::lt

    • and

      default Expr and(Expr other)
      Logical AND: this AND other. 
      col("a").gt(lit(0)).and(col("b").lt(lit(100)))
      Parameters:
      other - the expression to combine
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: Expr::and

    • or

      default Expr or(Expr other)
      Logical OR: this OR other. 
      col("status").eq(lit("active")).or(col("status").eq(lit("pending")))
      Parameters:
      other - the expression to combine
      See Also:

      default Expr not()
      Logical NOT: NOT this. 
      col("is_active").not()

    • sort

      default SortExpr sort(boolean asc, boolean nullsFirst)
      Sort with explicit control over direction and null ordering. 
      col("name").sort(true, false) // ascending, nulls last
      Parameters:
      asc - true for ascending, false for descending
      nullsFirst - true to sort nulls first
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: Expr::sort
